title: Extend B0183 tournament sim with a bold_during_cuts posture
source: CEO directive 2026-06-16 + edge-options briefing gap: lateral prizes are gated on surviving the return-ranked cuts (project_lateral_prizes_gated_on_advancing), so flat-without-edge most likely never reaches the finals.
why: The B0183 sim only models variance in the FINALS (flat_bold_finals, edge_bold_finals). It never models bounded variance DURING the R1-R3 cuts to gamble INTO the top-100. Since survival_flat is cut by R3 under the realistic 'fair' regime (P(R3)=0.03) and the lateral prizes (Architecture/Sharpe) + finals are ALL gated on reaching top-100, flat-without-edge is a slow death. The open question: conditional on NO return edge (OSR/L2 fails the Jun-18 gate or the live-L2 fix slips the freeze), does a bounded, forced-liq-safe variance push during R1-R3 beat flat? This is the contingency posture the sim has no number for.
value_rationale: Quantifies the only fallback path if the return edge does not land. Directly feeds B0182 (posture/rung) and the launch decision.
scope: Add a 'bold_during_cuts' posture to tournament_sim (engine/scoring): elevated per-round book variance during R1-R3, envelope-bounded so it can never trigger forced liquidation (sec14 = elimination).
TDD: new tests asserting the posture's variance is applied per-round, the forced-liq envelope is never breached, and the composite score uses it.
Run 800 trials/regime across fair/subfair/toxic; report P(R1/R2/R3=top100), P(top25), mean finalRank vs survival_flat and the barbell.
Sweep the variance level to find the P(reach-top100)-vs-P(eliminated-in-cuts) frontier.
Append findings to docs/submission/tournament_sim_findings_2026-06-16.md (surface only; posture CEO-reserved B0182).
recommendation: Model it envelope-bounded like the finals sleeve; report whether bounded cut-phase variance dominates flat conditional on no edge. Do not recommend a posture (CEO-reserved).
out_of_scope: Choosing the launch posture (B0182); building new strategy code beyond the sim.

history.reason: dispatched: TDD extension of tournament sim

Sim extended with bold_during_cuts + bold_during_cuts_and_finals (57 tournament tests green, independently re-run). Result: conditional on NO edge, bounded cut-phase variance DOMINATES flat under fair (P(top100) 0.03->0.25, P(top25) 0.00->0.20); knee ~8%/day, diminishing/negative above; stacking finals variance HURTS the tail (0.198->0.117 = over-betting); forced-liq never trips (0/50000 at 15%/day, worst trough 50%). vs barbell: not a substitute - lower P(R3) (0.25 vs 0.51) + worse mean rank (32 vs 39) but higher tail (0.20 vs 0.10) with no edge; strictly dominates flat if the edge fails. Surfaced to findings doc; posture CEO-reserved B0182.
